text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki and I are on our way home after a
day out when she stops in front of an old book
store.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, would it be okay if we took a slight
detour?
choice_data_list: Oh, want to do some shopping?
Oh, want to do some shopping?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Yes. This store has an old book I've been wanting
to buy for some time. I've been saving up to buy
it.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It's a book that documents the physical training
methods of various jujitsu schools, as well as
techniques of schools whose lineages have come
to an end. It's an extremely valuable record.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The mere thought of those lost techniques... I
can't wait to see how much I can learn.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wait for Yaeno Muteki in front of the shop.
Soon, however...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It's gone! The book is nowhere in sight! I'm certain
it was there just the other day!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Pardon me, shopkeeper! The valuable book that
was on the back shelf—has it been sold?!

text_block_list.name: Elderly Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Oh yes, a girl came and bought that book
just a few moments ago.

text_block_list.name: Elderly Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text:
In fact, you two were wearing the same uniform.
What school is that again?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
A student from Tracen Academy?! And if she
recently bought the book, she must still be
nearby!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to peruse a few of its pages at the very
least...
Let's chase after her!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I got some great shopping done! ♪ ...All right,
this looks like a solid reading spot.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It's Ryan! And look! She's holding a bag from the
store!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I always thought Ryan specialized in modern
training methods, but to think she holds an
interest in traditional techniques as well...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Ryan! I have a life-or-death request!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, Yaeno? What's got you looking so
desperate?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
That book you just purchased... Would it be
possible for me to take a look at it?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Y-you mean this?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I had no idea that you were also interested in this
subject matter.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Wait a sec... Are you saying... you, uh, want to
read this book too?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: It would be more accurate to say that, considering the path I've walked, it would be a failure for me not to read it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
R-really?! Suddenly, I want to know all about your
past!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I'd be eternally grateful if you'd let me join you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
O-okay, okay! I get it! I'll show you the book, so
just take it easy!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
You have my deepest gratitude! I will remember
your selfless gesture for the rest of my life!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Whaaa?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Wh-what is this book? On the very first page we turn to... c-c-canoodling?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Whoa, whoa, whoa! Don't say that out loud! Even for a romance comic... this one's got a load of—ahem—bold scenes!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what is the meaning of this? I thought this
book covered traditional training methods!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Aaaagh... Th-they're holding hands, and... they're even doing that!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Wh-whoa, shhh! Keep it down!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Aaaah! Nooooo...
choice_data_list: Those are some interesting traditional training methods.

So where's the actual book you were looking
for?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: No! This is definitely the wrong book!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Th-this... was all a misunderstanding on my part.
But how?! Why?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Ahhh! I'm such a fool! We're all fooools!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...It turns out that the shopkeeper had just moved
the book in question when reorganizing the
shelves.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Y-yes, indeed... Where in the world could it be?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Yes... Right away.
Um, apologies, Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
H-hey?! Hold on a sec! You're just going to take
off after embarrassing me like that?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...It turns out that the shopkeeper had just moved
the book in question when reorganizing the
shelves.
